content: macOS Gatekeeper: since Sequoia (macOS 15), users can no longer override an unsigned/unnotarized app via simple right-click; the only path is System Settings > Privacy & Security > 'Open Anyway' after a first blocked attempt. Notarization requires a paid Apple Developer Program membership ($99/yr) — there is no free path to notarize software for other people to run. Unsigned/unnotarized installers will always show a scary warning on first launch; the mitigation is explaining the workaround clearly, not eliminating the warning.
